title: [Submission] Random LinearMaps + LoRA Adapters
author: austinluk

data.description: Uses grouped query attention with 4 KV heads.
Adds low-rank adapters to linear layers on top of frozen random base weights.
Freezes most weights as deterministic pseudo-random projections regenerated from a seed.

novel_contributions: Trains only small LoRA-style adapters while keeping a large random backbone frozen.
Regenerates the backbone from a deterministic seed at load time, so frozen weights cost 0 bytes in the artifact.
Serializes only trainable adapter weights plus seed, enabling a much larger effective model within the 16MB limit.
Uses a split optimizer setup with Muon for LoRA matrices and Adam for embeddings/norms/control parameters.
Applies int8 plus zlib compression to the trainable subset.
